title: Bat Removal & Exclusion Services in Franklin Square, NY | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion in Franklin Square, Long Island. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Franklin Square homeowners deserve safe, effective bat removal services that protect both families and property. Our licensed specialists provide comprehensive bat exclusion solutions throughout Franklin Square, addressing infestations in attics, chimneys, and other entry points common in Long Island homes. We combine humane removal techniques with permanent exclusion methods to ensure bats don't return to your property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Franklin Square residents for years with reliable, same-day bat removal services. Our technicians are specially trained in New York State bat exclusion regulations and use only humane, eco-friendly methods that comply with all local wildlife protection laws while ensuring your home remains bat-free.
localContext: Franklin Square's mix of post-war Cape Cod homes and ranch-style properties near the Garden City border often feature attic spaces and roof vents that attract bats seeking shelter. The tree-lined neighborhoods around Rath Park and proximity to meadowlands create ideal habitats for bat populations that frequently migrate into residential structures during warmer months.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Franklin Square typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Franklin Square safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New York State guidelines for humane bat exclusion. We never trap or harm bats, instead using one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but prevent re-entry. Our methods are completely safe for your family, pets, and the bats themselves.

faqs.question: What time of year is best for bat removal in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: The ideal time for bat exclusion in Franklin Square is spring (March-April) or fall (August-October). We cannot perform exclusions during summer maternity season (May-July) when flightless pups could be trapped inside, in compliance with New York wildlife protection laws.

faqs.question: Do you clean up bat droppings and damage in Franklin Square homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our comprehensive service includes full attic cleanup, guano removal, insulation replacement if needed, and sanitization to eliminate health hazards. We also repair entry points and damaged areas to restore your Franklin Square home and prevent future bat problems.
